name: sendflow
description: SendFlow - Solana-native USDC remittance agent (ElizaOS v2 monorepo)

scripts.build: bun run --filter @sendflow/plugin-intent-parser build && bun run --filter @sendflow/plugin-usdc-handler build && bun run --filter @sendflow/plugin-payout-router build && bun run --filter @sendflow/plugin-notifier build && bun run --filter @sendflow/plugin-rate-checker build && bun run --filter @sendflow/sendflow-agent build
